description: Demonstration corpus for the golden sum.perspective_risk_receipt.v1 fixture. Self-authored factual (source, rendering, cohort) triples — extractive compression (a subset of the source's own sentences), so the lexical scorer is a fair proxy. Two cohorts ('plain', 'technical') so the perspective receipt carries a per-cohort bound. No third-party text, no copyright.

triples.source: Water is a chemical compound of hydrogen and oxygen. It covers most of the surface of the Earth. Its solid form is less dense than its liquid form.
triples.rendering: Water is a chemical compound of hydrogen and oxygen.

triples.source: The Moon is the only natural satellite of the Earth. Its gravity is the main cause of ocean tides. The same side always faces our planet.
triples.rendering: The Moon is the only natural satellite of the Earth. Its gravity is the main cause of ocean tides.

triples.source: A glacier is a large body of ice that moves slowly over land. It forms where snow accumulates faster than it melts. Many glaciers have retreated as the climate has warmed.
triples.rendering: A glacier is a large body of ice that moves slowly over land.

triples.source: The Amazon is the largest tropical rainforest on Earth. It produces a large share of the planet's oxygen. Thousands of species live nowhere else.
triples.rendering: The Amazon is the largest tropical rainforest on Earth.

triples.source: A compass points toward the magnetic poles. Sailors used it to navigate long before satellites. Its needle is a small magnet free to rotate.
triples.rendering: A compass points toward the magnetic poles. Its needle is a small magnet free to rotate.

triples.source: A telescope gathers light to make distant objects appear closer. Early designs used lenses, later ones used mirrors. It transformed our understanding of the sky.
triples.rendering: A telescope gathers light to make distant objects appear closer.

triples.source: A vaccine trains the immune system to recognise a pathogen. It often uses a weakened form of the microbe. Vaccination eradicated smallpox worldwide.
triples.rendering: A vaccine trains the immune system to recognise a pathogen.

triples.source: Electricity is the flow of electric charge through a conductor. It powers homes and most modern devices. Generators convert motion into electrical energy.
triples.rendering: Electricity is the flow of electric charge through a conductor. Generators convert motion into electrical energy.

triples.source: Photosynthesis converts light energy into chemical energy stored in glucose via the Calvin cycle. Plants reduce carbon dioxide using NADPH and ATP from the light reactions. Oxygen is released as a by-product of water photolysis at photosystem II.
triples.rendering: Photosynthesis converts light energy into chemical energy stored in glucose via the Calvin cycle.

triples.source: DNA carries genetic instructions encoded as sequences of four nucleotide bases. The double helix is held by complementary base pairing between adenine-thymine and guanine-cytosine. Replication is semiconservative, each strand templating a new partner.
triples.rendering: DNA carries genetic instructions encoded as sequences of four nucleotide bases.

triples.source: Antibiotics inhibit bacterial growth by targeting cell-wall synthesis, protein translation, or DNA replication. They are ineffective against viruses, which lack those machineries. Overuse selects for resistant strains via horizontal gene transfer.
triples.rendering: Antibiotics inhibit bacterial growth by targeting cell-wall synthesis, protein translation, or DNA replication.

triples.source: Gravity is described by general relativity as the curvature of spacetime induced by mass-energy. The field equations relate the Einstein tensor to the stress-energy tensor. In the weak-field limit it reduces to Newtonian inverse-square attraction.
triples.rendering: Gravity is described by general relativity as the curvature of spacetime induced by mass-energy.
